articles.title: Show HN: A Karpathy-style LLM wiki your agents maintain (Markdown and Git)
articles.description: I shipped a wiki layer for AI agents that uses markdown + git as the source of truth, with a bleve (BM25) + SQLite index on top. No vector or graph db yet. It runs locally in ~/.wuphf/wiki/ and you can git clone it out if you want to take your knowledge with you. The shape is the one Karpathy has been circling for a while: an LLM-native knowledge substrate that agents both read from and write into, so context compounds across sessions rather than getting re-pasted every morning. Most implementations of that idea land on Postgres, pgvector, Neo4j, Kafka, and a dashboard. I wanted to go back to

tech.summary:
🔬 今日科技动态摘要

1. **消费电子与智能硬件创新**：Govee智能灯、Xbox工作室动态、令人兴奋的笔记本电脑、宝马可变色汽车、谷歌Pixel Watch 4促销等，显示智能家居、游戏、可穿戴设备及汽车技术持续推陈出新。

2. **软件与系统更新政策调整**：微软允许用户将Windows更新暂停最多35天（可无限次操作），反映用户对系统更新自主权的需求增强。

3. **科技巨头投资与合作加速**：谷歌计划向AI公司Anthropic投资高达400亿美元，欧洲率先批准莫德纳的mRNA流感-新冠联合疫苗，显示AI和生物医药领域资本与监管双轮驱动。

4. **娱乐与信息安全事件**：《阿凡达》新片泄露嫌疑人被捕，Alex Jones再提阴谋论，Palantir员工讨论公司“走向法西斯”，凸显内容安全、企业伦理与内部文化争议。

5. **太空探索与国防技术进展**：Artemis II打破宇航员距离纪录，Golden Dome轨道拦截器研发团队曝光，标志太空任务与军事航天技术同步推进。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：谷歌对Anthropic的巨额投资（最高400亿美元）与欧洲率先批准mRNA联合疫苗，共同表明AI和生物医药领域正成为全球科技竞赛的核心战场。

ai.summary:
🔬 今日AI动态摘要

1. **DeepSeek-V4重磅发布，百万token长上下文成现实**：DeepSeek-V4正式亮相，支持百万token超长上下文，已在Hugging Face、PPIO、华为云等平台上线或适配，标志着国产大模型在长文本处理能力上取得关键突破，并公开了长达484天的详细技术迭代报告。

2. **自动驾驶与物理AI加速融合**：轻舟智航率先进军“物理AI”赛道，Mobileye公布2026财年一季度营收增长27%，显示自动驾驶商业化进程持续提速。同时，华为乾崑智驾加持的全新奥迪Q5L实现燃油SUV智能化升级，传统车企智能化转型加速。

3. **国产AI生图能力再突破，硬刚GPT-Image-2**：国内AI图像生成模型被曝“捅破天花板”，直接对标GPT-Image-2，表明国产多模态生成能力正快速追赶国际前沿水平。

4. **AI向家庭与宠物场景渗透**：涂鸦智能推出“Hey Tuya”全屋智能超级入口，实现AI自主监测宠物健康；优必选发布“Thinker cosmos”开发者生态平台，推动人形机器人走向规模化应用，AI正从专业领域向日常家庭生活落地。

5. **学术界与产业界人才突破引关注**：一篇由“0博士”团队（含两位GPT天才本科生及一位二本背景研究者）完成的论文获得ICLR时间检验奖，十年研究终获认可，凸显AI领域人才多元化和长期积累的价值。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：**DeepSeek-V4的正式发布**，不仅以百万token上下文能力刷新行业标杆，更通过详尽的技术复盘和全平台适配，展现了国产大模型在工程化与开放生态上的系统性进步。

articles.description: A wild Asian elephant turned a highway in southwest China's Yunnan province into its playground, damaging a minibus and a sedan Saturday afternoon.

articles.title: Algerian boy, 12, wins Shenzhen talent contest
articles.description: A 12-year-old Algerian boy was crowned winner of the eighth Shenzhen Expats Chinese Talent Competition on Sunday.

articles.title: Duke Kunshan starts search for bachelor’s degree students
articles.description: Duke Kunshan University, a joint venture between Duke University in the US and China’s Wuhan University, has started to enroll its first class of undergraduate students.

articles.title: Former Chongqing Party chief under investigation
articles.description: Sun Zhengcai, the former Party chief of Chongqing, is being investigated on allegations of bribery, State prosecutors said on Monday.

articles.title: Top procuratorate investigates Sun Zhengcai
articles.description: The Supreme People's Procuratorate (SPP) of China announced on Monday that it has started investigation into Sun Zhengcai, former secretary of Chongqing Municipal Committee of the Communist Party of China (CPC).

articles.title: Xi stresses nonstop efforts to fight undesirable work styles
articles.description: Xi Jinping, general secretary of the Communist Party of China Central Committee, stressed that the fight against undesirable work styles should not be stopped.

articles.title: World's largest automated container terminal starts operation in Shanghai
articles.description: As part of the Shanghai Free Trade Zone, the system can operate completely unmanned.

articles.title: China launches communication satellite for Algeria
articles.description: China launched Algeria's first communication satellite, Alcomsat-1, into a preset orbit from the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in the southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

articles.title: Chinese, Algerian presidents hail successful launch of communications satellite
articles.description: President Xi Jinping and his Algerian counterpart Abdelaziz Bouteflika exchanged congratulatory messages on the successful launch of Alcomsat-1 in the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in China's southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

articles.title: Autopsy: Jiang suffered several injuries before the fatal stab
articles.description: The trial of the alleged murderer of Chinese student Jiang Ge began at 10 am on Monday in Tokyo. It will last seven days and the verdict is expected on Dec 20.

articles.title: Asia's tallest wooden pagoda destroyed
articles.description: The 16-story structure was said to be the tallest wooden pagoda in Asia. No casualties were reported in the incident. The cause of the blaze is under investigation.

articles.title: Guizhou: Western province looks to the future of big data
articles.description: While located in the remote southwestern part of China, Guizhou leads the development of Big Data technology in recent years.

cctv.summary:
🔬 今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **习近平强调整治不良工作作风，推动外交亲近世界**：习近平主席要求“根除不良工作作风”，同时“习式外交”持续拉近中国与世界的距离，体现内外兼修的发展思路。

2. **中俄联合反导演练与军事技术民用化并进**：北京与莫斯科举行潜在导弹战争演练，同时中国推动更多军事技术转向民用领域以提振经济，显示国防与经济发展深度融合。

3. **民生领域聚焦教育、医疗费用及环境改善**：教育、医疗费用成为社会关注焦点；国际组织赞扬中国绿色复兴成果；南水北调工程推动环境改善并创造就业，体现可持续发展与民生保障。

4. **反腐与两岸关系持续受关注**：重庆原政治官员面临腐败调查，台湾新党承诺助力改善两岸关系，显示反腐常态化与对台政策持续发力。

5. **国际合作与科技突破并行**：中国为阿拉伯国家发射首颗卫星，亚投行贷款2.5亿美元支持北京煤改气工程，展现中国在航天、金融、能源转型领域的国际合作与自主创新。

今日最值得关注的发展是习近平主席同时聚焦内部作风整治与外部外交亲近，表明中国在强化治理能力的同时，正以更开放的姿态融入全球体系。
